name: SectionPlane
summary: The SectionPlane class represents a section plane in a SketchUp model. Note that prior to SketchUp 2014 there was no way to create a SectionPlane object using Ruby. For older versions of SketchUp, you must manually create a section plane with the Section Plane Tool in SketchUp and then query the entities array to find the SectionPlane object.

methods.name: activate
methods.summary: The activate method is used to make the section plane the active one of its parent component/group.
methods.remarks: The activate method is used to make the section plane the active one of its parent component/group.

methods.name: active?
methods.summary: The active? method indicates whether the section plane is active or not.
methods.remarks: The active? method indicates whether the section plane is active or not.

methods.name: get_plane
methods.summary: The get_plane method is used to retrieve the plane that the section plane is on.
methods.remarks: The get_plane method is used to retrieve the plane that the section plane is on.

returns.doc: plane - a plane. See the Geom module and Array class for further information on planes.

methods.name: set_plane
methods.summary: The set_plane method is used to set the plane that the section plane is on.
methods.remarks: The set_plane method is used to set the plane that the section plane is on.

params.name: plane
params.doc: An array representing the new plane,

properties.name: name
properties.summary: The #name method is used to retrieve the name of the section plane.
properties.remarks: The #name method is used to retrieve the name of the section plane.

properties.name: symbol
properties.summary: The #symbol method is used to retrieve the symbol of the section plane.
properties.remarks: The #symbol method is used to retrieve the symbol of the section plane.
